message:
perf(http2): #[inline] frame encode functions + batch FrameHeader write

Add #[inline] to all 12 frame encode() methods, FrameHeader::write(),
and HPACK encode_integer/encode_string hot-path helpers. Replace 9
individual put_u8 calls in FrameHeader::write with a single
extend_from_slice of a 9-byte array, eliminating per-byte bounds checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
